titlestmt.titleproper: First Baptist Church of Ithaca records2004
titlestmt.author: Compiled by F. Tellez, N. Dean

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-06-05 18:09:01 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: First Baptist Church of Ithaca records
did.physdesc: Correspondence, scrapbooks, pamphlets, books, minutes, tape recordings, architectural plans.
did.abstract: Materials from the Board of Trustees, boards of deacons and deaconesses, and church meetings; lists of members, baptisms, and funerals; records of women's and youth organizations; Sunday School materials; letters from donors to the church building fund. Tape recordings of services; plans for remodelling the church; records of the Danby Baptist Church and the First Baptist Church of Christ of Ithaca.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Minutes of the Board of Trustees, boards of deacons and deaconesses, and church meetings; lists of members, baptisms, and funerals; minutes statistics and correspondence of various church officials and boards; constitution; financial records; minutes, reports, accounts, and other records of various women's and youth organizations, including the Women's Missionary Society, Women's Union, and Women's Fellowship; Sunday School rolls and minutes; various other letters, resolutions, pamphlets, scrapbooks, photographs, hymn books, church newsletters, historical data, and letters from donors to the church building fund, 1889-91. There are also tape recordings of services conducted by Rev. Christian B. Jensen; plans for remodelling the church, Clarence A. Martin, architect, 1930-32; and records of the Danby Baptist Church and the First Baptist Church of Christ of Ithaca, 1811-38.

emph.ref: Series II. Letters regarding construction of new church
Series VII. Studies and drawings for remodelling of the First Baptist Church, Ithaca, N.Y., 1930-1932

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: First Baptist Church of Ithaca records, #2004. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to Box 8 restricted until 18 July 2047

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to Box 10 restricted until 18 July 2067.

Women in church work.
Religion.

Church architecture.
Baptists.
controlaccess.corpname: First Baptist Church of Christ of Ithaca

did.unittitle: Vol. of minutes, index in back of vol.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Dolly Cornell Letter, Apr. 13, 1834 No Coon or Snow Entries.

did.unittitle: Vol. of minutes, index in back of vol.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: No Cornell or Coon entries, but Mrs. Cora A. Snow entry (bapt. June 4, 1893)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Loose leg. fld. with material removed from volumes in orig. acc., alphabetical list of members, n.d., no Coon or Cornell entries, but a Mary J. Snow, dismissed Sept. 2, 1857, dismissed Feb. 18, 1858.

did.unittitle: Board of Trustees Contracts, Correspondence, Misc.
Copy of Historic Structure Report from Egner
Pulpit Committee - Minutes, ministerial service records, correspondence re pastor candidates

unittitle.title: History of the Seneca Baptist Association

Mexico, Central and South America, West Indies

Photograph, Photograph Albums (2), Citation, Broadside, Recording, Newsclippings, Scrapbooks
Certificate of Membership issued by the World Wide Baraca Philathea Union to the Men's Baraca Bible Class of
Book: The Pastor in a Teaching Church (Evans)
Copper printing plates: Sanctuary of First Baptist

Annual Reports to American Baptist Convention

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Duc Nguyen & Family; Koketso/Setshwaelo; Olebeng/Setshwaelo; Nhung Nguyen; Kyan Than & Family; Girich - Plotnikov Goncharenko; Desmangles, Ossee & Robert; Lingli (mother & daughter); Tarasevich Family

did.unittitle: Series II. Letters regarding construction of new church
Fundraising pamphlet by Robert T. Jones
Jones, Robert to Mrs. A. B. Cornell
Correspondence with Historic Ithaca, City of Ithaca, etc.
Miscellaneous: maps of Ithaca, Site Plans, Campaign Booklets
Tape 1 of Reverend Christian B. Jensen (8 services)
Tape 2 of Reverend Christian B. Jensen (8 services)
Series VII. Studies and drawings for remodelling of the First Baptist Church, Ithaca, N.Y., 1930-1932

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These concern alterations to the Chancel, Organ, Vestry, Pulpit, Lectern, Sunday School Quarters, closets, bookcases, etc.
Architect - Clarence A. Martin, Ithaca, N.Y. in conjunction with George E. Merrill, The American Baptist Home Mission Society, New York, N.Y.

did.unittitle: 17 Tracing paper sheets - 7 "14" x 18", 4 16" x 18", 6 20" x 30"
2 Letters from Austin Organ Company (Copies in drawing folder, originals with main collection)
1 Letter from George E. Merrill to Clarence A. Martin
1 Letter from Clarence A. Martin to George E. Merrill (carbon copies in drawing folder, originals with main collection)
3 8" x 10" graph paper sheets with pencilled notes re parts of the church
